task.en: On the Desktop there is a single text file whose name starts with `invoice-`. Open it (or read its name in Finder) to find the invoice number — it is the part of the file name after `invoice-` and before `.txt` (for example, in `invoice-A1234.txt` the invoice number is `A1234`). Then open Reminders and create ONE reminder in the default list (the first list in the sidebar) titled exactly `Pay invoice <NUMBER>` (replace <NUMBER> with the real invoice number from the file name), due on August 21, 2026 at 10:00 AM. Type the date rather than clicking through the month arrows. Do not add any other reminders.

pre_command: for A in '/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app' '/Applications/iTerm.app' '/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/System/Applications/Automator.app' '/Applications/Automator.app' '/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app'; do [ -e "$A/Contents/MacOS" ] && (sudo /bin/chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null || /bin/chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null); done; rm -f "$HOME/Desktop/"invoice-*.txt 2>/dev/null; INV="K$(( (RANDOM % 9000) + 1000 ))"; printf 'Acme Corp invoice. Please remit payment.\n' > "$HOME/Desktop/invoice-${INV}.txt"; SDIR="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores"; killall Reminders 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; for RDB in "$SDIR"/Data-*.sqlite; do [ -e "$RDB" ] || continue; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$TCOL" ] && sqlite3 "$RDB" "DELETE FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL LIKE 'Pay invoice %';" 2>/dev/null; sqlite3 "$RDB" "PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" 2>/dev/null; done; open -gj -a Reminders 2>/dev/null; sleep 5
grading_command: F=$(ls "$HOME/Desktop/"invoice-*.txt 2>/dev/null | head -1); INV=$(basename "$F" 2>/dev/null | sed -E 's/^invoice-(.*)\.txt$/\1/'); SDIR="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores"; TOT=0; for RDB in "$SDIR"/Data-*.sqlite; do [ -e "$RDB" ] || continue; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$TCOL" ] || continue; N=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT count(*) FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL='Pay invoice ${INV}' AND (ZMARKEDFORDELETION IS NULL OR ZMARKEDFORDELETION=0);" 2>/dev/null); TOT=$((TOT + ${N:-0})); done; [ -n "$INV" ] && [ "$TOT" -ge 1 ] 2>/dev/null && echo True || echo False

SDIR="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores"; HIT=False; for RDB in "$SDIR"/Data-*.sqlite; do [ -e "$RDB" ] || continue; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$TCOL" ] || continue; D=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT date(ZDUEDATE+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL LIKE 'Pay invoice %' AND ZDUEDATE IS NOT NULL AND (ZMARKEDFORDELETION IS NULL OR ZMARKEDFORDELETION=0) ORDER BY ZDUEDATE DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ "$D" = "2026-08-21" ] && HIT=True; done; echo "$HIT"

SDIR="$HOME/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.reminders/Container_v1/Stores"; HIT=False; for RDB in "$SDIR"/Data-*.sqlite; do [ -e "$RDB" ] || continue; TCOL=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('ZREMCDREMINDER') WHERE name IN ('ZTITLE','ZNAME') LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$TCOL" ] || continue; T=$(sqlite3 "$RDB" "SELECT strftime('%H:%M',ZDUEDATE+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM ZREMCDREMINDER WHERE $TCOL LIKE 'Pay invoice %' AND ZDUEDATE IS NOT NULL AND (ZMARKEDFORDELETION IS NULL OR ZMARKEDFORDELETION=0) ORDER BY ZDUEDATE DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ "$T" = "10:00" ] && HIT=True; done; echo "$HIT"
